2026-02-01.name: AI Context Window Explorer
2026-02-01.description: Learn about context windows in AI models: what they are, why they matter, and how different models compare

2026-02-02.name: AI Stand-up Comedian
2026-02-02.description: Generate jokes, roasts, and funny stories with AI-powered voice narration using HuggingFace TTS

2026-02-03.name: AI Attention Explorer
2026-02-03.description: Explore how attention mechanisms work in transformers: the math, intuition, and how AI focuses on relevant information

2026-02-04.name: AI Superhero Forge
2026-02-04.description: Create your own superhero with AI: generate a name, powers, backstory, weakness, and avatar image

2026-02-05.name: AI GPU & Training Cost Calculator
2026-02-05.description: Estimate AI training costs with real GPU specs — compare A100 vs H100 vs TPU, calculate power consumption, and optimize your budget

2026-02-06.name: AI Mystic Fortune Teller
2026-02-06.description: Discover what the future holds! Get personalized AI-generated fortunes with mystical visuals and categories like love, career, wealth, and adventure

2026-02-07.name: AI Model Collapse Simulator
2026-02-07.description: Explore the phenomenon where AI models degrade when trained on their own synthetic outputs through interactive simulations

2026-02-08.name: AI Mystic Oracle
2026-02-08.description: Ask questions, draw tarot cards, gaze into the crystal ball, and check your daily horoscope — all with AI-powered mystical predictions and TTS narration

2026-02-09.name: AI Code Review Bot
2026-02-09.description: Paste code and get a thorough code review — security issues, performance problems, style suggestions, and refactoring ideas

2026-02-10.name: AI Ice Cream Flavor Generator
2026-02-10.description: Generate creative and delicious ice cream flavor ideas with AI, including name, description, ingredients, and visual representation

2026-02-11.name: AI Tokenization Visualizer
2026-02-11.description: Explore how text is broken into tokens for AI models: visualize token splits, compare tokenizers, and learn efficiency tips

2026-02-12.name: AI Love Letter Analyst
2026-02-12.description: Explore how AI understands romantic language, generate personalized love letters, and learn about sentiment analysis and emotional AI

2026-02-13.name: AI Research Paper Summarizer
2026-02-13.description: Enter any AI paper title or topic and get a plain-English summary — key findings, methodology, impact, and 'so what?' explained simply

2026-02-14.name: AI Regex Builder
2026-02-14.description: Describe what you want to match in plain English and get a regex pattern with explanation, test cases, and visual breakdown

2026-02-15.name: AI Excuse Generator
2026-02-15.description: Need an excuse? AI generates increasingly elaborate and creative excuses for any situation — from missing meetings to forgetting birthdays

2026-02-16.name: AI Learning Path Generator
2026-02-16.description: Enter any skill you want to learn and get a personalized study plan with resources, milestones, and estimated time to competency

2026-02-18.name: MicroGPT Trainer
2026-02-18.description: Train a tiny GPT neural network right in your browser — watch weights update, loss decrease, and generate text in real-time. Inspired by Karpathy microGPT.

2026-02-19.name: AI Alien Language Translator
2026-02-19.description: AI invents an alien language and translates your messages — complete with grammar rules, pronunciation guide, and cultural notes

2026-02-20.name: AI Model Showdown
2026-02-20.description: Compare AI models side-by-side with real specs — context windows, cost, benchmarks, and open-source status from our database of 13+ models

2026-02-21.name: AI World Builder
2026-02-21.description: Create detailed fictional worlds with AI — geography, cultures, history, and conflicts. Generate maps descriptions, character archetypes, and plot hooks

2026-02-22.name: AI Meme Explainer
2026-02-22.description: Paste any AI/tech meme description and get a serious academic explanation of why it's funny — plus the real CS concept behind it

2026-02-23.name: AI News Credibility Lab
2026-02-23.description: Paste a headline or short article snippet and get an interactive, educational analysis of whether it looks AI-generated, why, and how to verify or improve its trustworthiness.

2026-02-24.name: Model Training Ops Lab
2026-02-24.description: Enter a training scenario to get an educational simulated monitoring dashboard, failure analysis, and step-by-step debugging guidance.

2026-02-25.name: Token-Adaptive Quantization Playground
2026-02-25.description: Explore and experiment with token-adaptive quantization strategies for elastic LLMs—get tailored explanations, code snippets, trade-off analysis, and a hands-on tuning plan.

2026-02-26.name: One-Night Sleep Lab
2026-02-26.description: Interactively explore how AI research can infer future disease risk from a single night of sleep through lessons, mini-projects, and a model-design assistant.

2026-02-27.name: AI Language Accessibility Lab
2026-02-27.description: Try sample prompts at different English proficiency and formality levels to see how LLMs may perform, get rewrites, explanations and teaching exercises.

2026-02-28.name: GenCast Forecast Explorer
2026-02-28.description: Enter a location and date to get a generated, educational probabilistic medium-range weather forecast with visual guidance and model explainers.

2026-03-01.name: Visual Asset Localizer Lab
2026-03-01.description: Generate an AI-driven, step-by-step plan to adapt a visual asset for a specific platform and regional market, including models, prompts, workflow and checks.

2026-03-02.name: AI Code Explainer
2026-03-02.description: Paste any code snippet and get a clear, visual explanation of what it does — line by line, with complexity analysis and improvement suggestions

2026-03-03.name: BrainScan AI Lab
2026-03-03.description: Interactively explore how AI models infer biological sex from brain scans—learn methods, spot dataset confounds, run interpretability exercises, and design ethical experiments.

2026-03-04.name: Parallel Research Engine Designer
2026-03-04.description: Design and compare specialized AI research engines for a chosen domain and get tailored architectures, training plans, cost estimates, and safety guidance.

2026-03-05.name: AI Job Interview Simulator
2026-03-05.description: Practice AI/ML job interview questions — get technical questions, behavioral prompts, and detailed feedback on your answers

2026-03-06.name: Agentic Sandbox
2026-03-06.description: Design, probe, and perturb a tiny agentic LLM: pick a scenario, choose reward signals, and watch a simulated episode with risk annotations and alignment suggestions.

2026-03-07.name: AI Hires: Human Rental Simulator
2026-03-07.description: Design and simulate how an agentic AI would recruit, instruct, pay, and monitor humans to perform a microtask of your choice.

2026-03-08.name: Cortex BenchLab: Neuro‑Inspired LLM Tests
2026-03-08.description: Design playful, neuroscience‑inspired benchmark microtasks for probing LLM behavior and get creative test prompts, adversarial twists, and scoring rubrics.

2026-03-09.name: AI Compute Marketplace Sandbox
2026-03-09.description: Describe an AI workload and get a playful, education-first analysis that compares compute backends, trade-offs, cost estimates, and implementable next steps.

2026-03-10.name: AI Race Scenario Studio
2026-03-10.description: Enter a company, sector, or policy and get a vivid near-term scenario of how a major AI breakthrough (e.g., GPT-5.4) could reshape it, plus a tactical playbook and risk score.

2026-03-11.name: Model Release Lab
2026-03-11.description: Interactively generate playful, practical debriefs and bespoke evaluation plans for any newly released AI model.

2026-03-12.name: AI Trend Sherpa: Personalized 2026 Roadmap
2026-03-12.description: Type a technology, industry, or project and get a playful, data-informed mini-brief predicting how near-term AI trends will affect it, with concrete opportunities, risks, and a one-week experiment.
